files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [ main ]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [ main ]
+
+jobs:
+  lint-and-test:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Set up Go
+        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
+        with:
+          go-version-file: go.mod
+          cache: true
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: go mod download
+
+      - name: Lint
+        uses: golangci/golangci-lint-action@v6
+        with:
+          version: latest
+          args: --timeout=5m
+
+      - name: Test
+        run: go test ./...
